summary: Implemented updateTick(int24 newTick) with inline TickBitmap for O(1) initialized-tick lookup. Added _crossTick for feeGrowthOutside flipping and liquidityNet application, _nextInitializedTick with MSB/LSB bitmap search, _setTickBitmapBit/_clearTickBitmapBit for bitmap management, lastOperatorActivityTimestamp for feature 8 silence detection. Modified _initializeTick to set bitmap bits on first use. Fixed edge case where mask computation in _nextInitializedTick underflowed when bitPos=255. Gas-bounded at 256 crossings per call.
